examples: Ambience was important in playing the Chinese zither. Usually, it was practised in quiet setting and never for public performance.
It's sort of like a zither, but Latvian.
From haerbin, like to play flute and zither.
Even above the sound of the engine I can hear the insistent high-pitched zither of crickets.
While preaching, he often would dance, weep, make animal sounds, strip to his underwear, or play the zither.
